mapper.select: SELECT bs.settlement_id, bs.business_id, bs.order_id, bs.sales_amount, bs.commission_amount, bs.settlement_amount, bs.settlement_status, bs.created_at, o.order_no, c.nickname AS customer_nickname FROM business_settlement bs JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = bs.order_id JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE bs.business_id = #{businessId} ORDER BY bs.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT SUM(sales_amount) AS salesAmount, SUM(commission_amount) AS commissionAmount, SUM(settlement_amount) AS settlementAmount FROM business_settlement WHERE business_id = #{businessId} AND YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(created_at) = MONTH(NOW())

SELECT bs.business_id, b.company_name, SUM(bs.sales_amount) AS salesAmount, SUM(bs.commission_amount) AS commissionAmount, SUM(bs.settlement_amount) AS settlementAmount, COUNT(*) AS orderId FROM business_settlement bs JOIN business b ON b.business_id = bs.business_id GROUP BY bs.business_id, b.company_name ORDER BY bs.business_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT bs.settlement_id, bs.business_id, bs.order_id, bs.sales_amount, bs.commission_amount, bs.settlement_amount, bs.settlement_status, bs.created_at, o.order_no, c.nickname AS customer_nickname, b.company_name FROM business_settlement bs JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = bs.order_id JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN business b ON b.business_id = bs.business_id WHERE bs.business_id = #{businessId} ORDER BY bs.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT SUM(sales_amount) AS salesAmount, SUM(commission_amount) AS commissionAmount, SUM(settlement_amount) AS settlementAmount FROM business_settlement WHERE business_id = #{businessId} AND YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(created_at) = MONTH(NOW())
